hooks.command: node -e "const a=process.env.HOOK_TOOL_INPUT||'';if(/git add .*(\..env|env\.)/.test(a)){console.error('\u26d4  BLOCKED: .env 檔案不可加入 git commit！');process.exit(2);}"
node -e "const f=process.env.HOOK_TOOL_INPUT||'';if(/src\/stores\/(storeAuth|auth)\.js/.test(f)){console.log('\u26a0\ufe0f  提醒：修改了 auth 相關檔案，記得執行 /security 檢查。');}"
hooks.description: Remind to security-check auth files after edits
